overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring the Mediterranean-inspired town of Toussaint. The character traverses cobblestone streets, narrow alleys, and stone staircases with vibrant architecture, lush vegetation, and panoramic views of a lake and mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper town covered walkway transitioning to open street

events.description: exits covered wooden pergola into open sunlit cobblestone street
begins descending stone steps toward bridge archway

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through upper town streets, passing flower beds and stone architecture with swords on back

notable_agents.action: villager walking ahead on the cobblestone path

entered.detail: wooden beam structure providing partial cover over the walkway entrance
stone bridge with archway crossing over the path ahead
bright yellow plaster building with wooden shutters and terracotta roof
lush flower beds with purple and red blooms lining the stone path
stacked wooden barrels and crates beside the building entrance
cluster of buildings with distinctive orange terracotta roof tiles
distant mountain range visible under bright blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a wooden pergola structure before emerging into a sunlit upper town street. Geralt walks past vibrant flower beds and a stone bridge archway, with a yellow stucco building on the right and distant mountains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow ascending alley with stone stairs

events.description: enters narrow alleyway with yellow buildings and begins ascending stone stairs
light becomes dappled as the path enters a shaded rocky passage

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing stone stairs through a narrow passage between yellow buildings and rock walls

notable_agents.action: villager descending the stone stairs toward Geralt

entered.detail: tall yellow plaster building with weathered wooden door and stone foundation
steep stone stairs ascending between buildings with worn cobblestone steps
natural rock face forming the right wall of the narrow passage
dark wooden door with stone frame set into the yellow building
potted red flowers placed along the building wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a narrow ascending alley characterized by a prominent yellow building on the left and a natural rock wall on the right. The path consists of steep stone stairs, and a villager descends toward Geralt as the lighting becomes dappled in the shaded passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky passage opening to panoramic cliffside overlook

events.description: emerges from narrow rocky passage into area with red stucco building
path opens to reveal panoramic view of lake and mountain valley
turns left along cliffside wooden terrace while continuing ascent

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking up stone stairs along a cliffside terrace with expansive views of the lake and town below

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden barrels beside the red building

entered.detail: vibrant red stucco building with stone arches and columns at entrance
arched stone doorway leading into the red building
group of wooden barrels and crates stacked near the building wall
sudden expansive view of blue lake and distant shoreline
wooden balustrade along the cliff edge overlooking the town

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from a dark rocky passage to a bright open area featuring a distinctive red stucco building with stone arches. Around 32 seconds, the path opens dramatically to reveal a panoramic view of a blue lake and mountain valley. Geralt continues ascending along a wooden terrace railing with the town visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower town descending path with timber houses

events.description: begins descending stone stairs into lower town area
passes through garden area with dense vegetation and flowers

agents.ego_description: Geralt descending stone stairs through the lower town, passing timber-framed houses and garden areas

notable_agents.action: villager in green tunic walking down the stairs ahead of Geralt

entered.detail: traditional half-timbered house with exposed wooden beams and plaster infill
steep stone staircase leading down into the lower town
simple wooden fence lining the left side of the path
lush green bushes and flowering plants beside the houses

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends through the lower town via steep stone stairs, passing traditional timber-framed houses with lush garden vegetation. The path winds past wooden fences and flower beds as villagers walk through the picturesque medieval alleyways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant Mediterranean town, transitioning from sunlit upper streets through narrow rocky passages to a panoramic mountain vista before descending into the lower village. It begins under a wooden pergola, emerging into a bright street lined with flower beds and yellow stucco buildings that lead toward a distant mountain range. As the path narrows, the camera follows Geralt up steep stone stairs through a shaded alley flanked by a natural rock wall, where the lighting becomes dappled. The scene then opens dramatically from the dark passage into a bright plaza with red stucco arches, revealing a sweeping view of a blue lake and valley as the camera glides along a wooden terrace railing. Finally, the perspective shifts downward, winding through the lower town via steep stairs and timber-framed houses surrounded by lush garden vegetation and strolling villagers.
